title: Justice as Fairness - Wikipedia
content: "JusticeasFairness: Political not Metaphysical " is an essay by John Rawls, published in 1985. [1] In it he describes his conception ofjustice. It comprises two main principles of liberty and equality; the second is subdivided into fair equality of opportunity and the difference principle. Rawls arranges the principles in "lexical priority," prioritizing in the order of the liberty ...
